title: Front-half transition Route v2 phase
summary: After the beach outing lands, the front half should gain one stronger transition beat and one soft replay-aware variant so beach, coastal-scrub, and forest feel like a real chapter instead of disconnected stops. This wave focuses on a compact coast-to-forest comparison outing plus one existing-world-state replay layer.

execution_order.goal: Prepare a shore-pine-led front-half transition Route v2 handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The front half still needs one remembered coast-to-forest walk that does not duplicate the later full scrub transect.

execution_order.goal: Implement the shore-pine-led front-half transition outing.
execution_order.why_now: Turning the old back-dune inspect gate into one authored transition walk gives the front half a stronger chapter hinge.

execution_order.goal: Review the shore-pine-led front-half transition outing.
execution_order.why_now: The route should read as comparison and interpretation, not another disguised checklist.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the Wrack Shelter replay-process handoff for the beach opener.
execution_order.why_now: The board already surfaces the beach replay cue, but the active outing still does not inherit the live wrack-hold process.

execution_order.goal: Implement the Wrack Shelter replay focus on beach-shore-shelter.
execution_order.why_now: One gentle beach replay-aware variant makes the front half feel more alive without widening the filing or station shells.

execution_order.goal: Review the Wrack Shelter replay focus.
execution_order.why_now: The beach replay variant should stay subtle, route-first, and notebook-safe.

guardrails: Prefer existing assemble-evidence or transect seams over inventing a new route type.
For the replay step, prefer `beach-shore-shelter` plus `wrack-hold` over reopening the newly landed coastal transect.
Replay or process polish must use existing world-state, process, and note seams.
Do not add another map HUD, route log, or field-station panel.
Keep the front-half outing readable at the current station and journal density ceiling.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/lane-runner.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, .agents/lanes/lane-4.md, docs/reports/2026-04-03-lane-4-front-half-route-v2-follow-ons.md, docs/reports/2026-04-03-front-half-transition-route-v2-review.md, docs/reports/2026-04-03-front-half-replay-process-handoff.md, and this packet. Treat this as the next lane-4 front-half replay pass: keep `beach-shore-shelter` as the canonical opening Route v2 outing, add `processFocus` for the live `wrack-hold` beach window so the active outing becomes `Wrack Shelter`, keep notebook-ready and filed surfaces stable as `Shore Shelter`, and avoid adding any new replay system or station shell.
